description: REQ-TAG-010 step 2-3 requires calling applyFilterOrSearch() to compute new visibleNoteIds and emitting the existing FilterApplied action. The TagFilterToggled handler in feedReducer.ts (lines 217-238) only toggles activeFilterTags and emits raw filter commands (apply-tag-filter / remove-tag-filter). It does NOT call applyFilterOrSearch and does NOT emit FilterApplied with updated visibleNoteIds. The effectful shell (FeedList.svelte:116-121) delegates to adapter.dispatchApplyFilter/RemoveFilter, which are unimplemented (see FIND-002). This means toggling tag filters has no observable effect on the feed display — visibleNoteIds is never recomputed.
